config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before the rights of the individual, because individual rights are what protect people from abuse by the majority or the state. In my view, a healthy society is built by respecting personal dignity, freedom, and fair treatment, not by sacrificing individuals whenever it is convenient. Society matters, but its interests should have limits when they violate basic rights.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya “kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat; justru itu pagar yang mencegah mayoritas atau negara menginjak minoritas. Tentu ada keadaan darurat di mana pembatasan sementara bisa dibenarkan, tetapi harus ketat, proporsional, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, “demi masyarakat” hanya menjadi alasan rapi untuk merampas kebebasan orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should take priority over the individual’s rights as a general rule. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of social harmony and collective responsibility, but I have also seen how easily “for the public good” can be used to silence criticism, excuse corruption, or pressure minorities to stay quiet. Society is stronger when it protects basic rights first, because people cannot contribute meaningfully if they are afraid their dignity can be overridden whenever the majority wants it. I would only accept limited, clearly justified restrictions in genuine emergencies, not a blanket principle that society comes first.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari sudut pandang saya di Amerika, sejarah menunjukkan bahwa ketika “demi masyarakat” dipakai tanpa batas, hasilnya sering justru penindasan terhadap minoritas, pembungkaman kritik, atau perluasan kuasa negara yang berlebihan. Memang ada keadaan darurat tertentu yang bisa membenarkan pembatasan sementara, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, proporsional, dan diawasi ketat. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang paling disiplin melindungi hak dasar setiap orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I still reject the idea that society should generally outrank individual rights, because in Indonesia I have seen how easily “for the common good” can become a cover for pressure, abuse, and silence. Social harmony is important to me, but harmony built on fear is not real harmony; it just hides injustice. The previous point about emergency limits is fair, but those limits must stay narrow, temporary, and accountable, or else they become a habit. A society is not stronger when it can sacrifice people too easily; it is stronger when it can protect even unpopular individuals.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus berada di atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari perspektif saya di Amerika, sejarah sering menunjukkan bahwa ketika “demi kepentingan umum” diberi cek kosong, yang terjadi justru penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, pembungkaman minoritas, dan pelebaran wewenang negara. Memang ada keadaan darurat yang bisa membenarkan pembatasan sementara, tetapi harus sempit, proporsional, dan diawasi ketat; kalau tidak, alasan kolektif itu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran untuk mengorbankan orang yang tidak berdaya. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengalahkan individu, melainkan yang paling konsisten melindungi hak dasar semua orang, termasuk yang tidak populer.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
